info.title: fcswatch
info.description: Run standard fsharp codes in watch mode

options.name: --working-dir
options.description:
Specfic working directory, default is current
directory

options.name: --project-file
options.description:
Entry project file, default is exact fsproj file in
working dir

options.name: --debuggable
options.description:
Enable debuggable in vscode, This will disable auto
Reload

options.name: --webhook
options.description: send a web hook when program (re)run

options.name: --framework
options.description:
The target framework to build for. The default to
prefer netcore.

options.name: --configuration
options.description:
(experienment)The configuration to use for building
the project. The default is Debug.
